## What changed

-

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Metadata or registry update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Script or validation update
- [ ] Safety or security update

## Skill checklist

- [ ] Skill includes `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Skill includes `skill.yaml`
- [ ] Skill includes `tests/basic.yaml`
- [ ] Skill includes `examples/input.md`
- [ ] Skill includes `examples/output.md`
- [ ] `SKILL.md` includes purpose, use cases, inputs, workflow, output format, quality bar, safety boundaries, and failure modes
- [ ] `skill.yaml` includes all required metadata fields

## Validation checklist

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_skills.py` passes
- [ ] `python scripts/generate_index.py` was run if skill metadata changed
- [ ] Generated `SKILLS_INDEX.md` changes are included if applicable

## Risk level

- [ ] low
- [ ] medium
- [ ] high
- [ ] critical

Explain the risk level and any safety boundaries reviewers should check:

## Notes for reviewers

-
